sections.title: Introduction
sections.body_md:
This guide walks through the **2026-03-15** planning session for the synthetic Demo Project. It is a sample — adapt the archetype to your own session files.

:::callout {type=info}
Replace this content by re-running `learning-guide:analyze` against your real session file.
:::

sections.title: Decisions
sections.body_md:
- Adopt event-sourced reconciliation. Tracking ticket: TICKET-101.
- Defer rate-limiter swap to phase 3.
- Consumer migration kicked off as TICKET-102.

sections.title: Open blockers
sections.body_md:
1. SLA target — product owner pending decision.
2. Retention window — data platform pending decision.

sections.title: Lessons
sections.body_md:
- Final-snapshot semantics scale poorly without discipline.
- Memory-bank guides are authoritative when they exist.

final_quiz.question: Which decision was deferred to phase 3?
final_quiz.explanation: The rate-limiter swap is deferred; reconciliation and migration are in scope now.

glossary.definition: A reconciliation strategy where state is rebuilt by replaying events from an append-only log.
